name: HWR_PER_PRFL_GROUP_B
description: The profile group table stores profile group data that applies to the entire group.

columns.Name: PROFILE_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the profile group table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for this profile group.

columns.Name: PRFL_GROUP_REPO
columns.Comments: The unique Id for writing to repo.

columns.Name: CATEGORY
columns.Comments: The category of this profile group.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: The description of this profile group.

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: The location of this profile group.

columns.Name: LOGO
columns.Comments: The image url for the logo of this profile group.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: The name of this profile group.

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: The short description of this profile group.

columns.Name: SMALL_LOGO
columns.Comments: The image url for the small logo of this profile group.

columns.Name: PROFILE_GROUP_TYPE
columns.Comments: The profile group type of this profile group.

columns.Name: UPDATED_ON
columns.Comments: The date this profile group was updated on.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: The URL for accessing this profile group.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
